concept: Cloud Service Provider Security Service Comparison
verificationNote: Service names from official CSP documentation as of early 2026. Service capabilities evolve rapidly — verify current offerings against CSP documentation. Alibaba Cloud and Huawei Cloud included for ASEAN/Malaysia relevance.
description: Side-by-side comparison of security services across major cloud service providers. This mapping enables organisations to identify equivalent controls when operating in multi-cloud environments or evaluating CSP alternatives. Service names are current but CSPs frequently rename, rebrand, or consolidate services.

categories.description: Core identity platform for authentication, authorization, RBAC, and federation
categories.aws: AWS IAM, AWS IAM Identity Center (formerly SSO)
categories.azure: Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure AD), Azure RBAC
categories.oracle: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure IAM, Oracle Identity Cloud Service

categories.description: Just-in-time privileged access, break-glass accounts, session management
categories.aws: AWS IAM Roles Anywhere, AWS Systems Manager Session Manager
categories.azure: Microsoft Entra Privileged Identity Management (PIM), Azure Bastion
categories.gcp: Google Cloud Privileged Access Manager, IAP (Identity-Aware Proxy)

categories.description: MFA enforcement for console and API access
categories.aws: AWS IAM MFA (virtual, hardware FIDO2, TOTP)
categories.azure: Microsoft Entra MFA (Authenticator, FIDO2, SMS, phone)
categories.gcp: Google 2-Step Verification (Titan Security Key, TOTP, prompts)

categories.description: Cloud-native threat detection, anomaly detection, and security analytics
categories.azure: Microsoft Defender for Cloud, Microsoft Sentinel
categories.gcp: Google Security Command Center (SCC), Chronicle Security Operations
categories.oracle: Oracle Cloud Guard, Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Security Zones

categories.description: Continuous assessment of cloud resource configuration against security benchmarks
categories.azure: Microsoft Defender for Cloud (CSPM), Defender Cloud Security Posture Management
categories.gcp: Google Security Command Center Premium (SCC Premium)

categories.description: Key management service, encryption at rest, customer-managed keys, HSM
categories.aws: AWS KMS, AWS CloudHSM, AWS ACM (Certificate Manager)
categories.azure: Azure Key Vault, Azure Dedicated HSM, Azure Managed HSM
categories.gcp: Google Cloud KMS, Cloud HSM, Cloud External Key Manager (EKM)
categories.alibaba: Alibaba Cloud KMS, Data Encryption Service
categories.oracle: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Vault, Oracle Key Management

categories.description: Virtual network isolation, firewalls, security groups, network ACLs
categories.aws: AWS VPC, Security Groups, Network ACLs, AWS Network Firewall
categories.azure: Azure VNet, NSG (Network Security Groups), Azure Firewall
categories.gcp: Google VPC, Firewall Rules, Cloud Armor, Hierarchical Firewall Policies
categories.alibaba: Alibaba Cloud VPC, Security Groups, Cloud Firewall
categories.huawei: Huawei Cloud VPC, Security Groups, Cloud Firewall (CFW)
categories.oracle: Oracle VCN, Security Lists, Network Security Groups, OCI Network Firewall

categories.description: Layer 7 application protection for web applications and APIs
categories.azure: Azure Web Application Firewall (on Application Gateway / Front Door)

categories.description: Distributed denial-of-service protection at network and application layers
categories.aws: AWS Shield Standard (free), AWS Shield Advanced
categories.azure: Azure DDoS Protection (Basic free, Standard paid)

categories.description: API activity logging, management plane audit trail, data access logging
categories.azure: Azure Activity Log, Azure Monitor, Microsoft Entra Audit Logs
categories.gcp: Google Cloud Audit Logs (Admin Activity, Data Access, System Event)

categories.description: Log aggregation, search, analysis, and security information and event management
categories.aws: Amazon CloudWatch Logs, Amazon OpenSearch Service, Amazon Security Lake
categories.azure: Azure Monitor Logs (Log Analytics), Microsoft Sentinel
categories.gcp: Google Cloud Logging, Chronicle Security Operations, BigQuery (for log analytics)
categories.oracle: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Logging, Oracle Logging Analytics

categories.description: Secure storage and rotation of application secrets, API keys, database credentials
categories.aws: AWS Secrets Manager, AWS Systems Manager Parameter Store
categories.azure: Azure Key Vault (Secrets), Azure App Configuration
categories.huawei: Huawei Cloud CSMS (Cloud Secret Management Service)

categories.description: Container image scanning, runtime protection, registry security, Kubernetes security
categories.aws: Amazon ECR Image Scanning, Amazon Inspector (container), Amazon GuardDuty EKS Protection
categories.azure: Microsoft Defender for Containers, Azure Container Registry vulnerability scanning
categories.gcp: Google Artifact Analysis, GKE Security Posture, Binary Authorization
categories.alibaba: Alibaba Cloud Container Registry (ACR) Image Scanning, Security Center Container Protection
categories.oracle: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Vulnerability Scanning (container images)

categories.description: Discovery, classification, and protection of sensitive data in cloud storage and services
categories.azure: Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention, Microsoft Purview Information Protection
categories.alibaba: Alibaba Cloud Sensitive Data Discovery and Protection (SDDP)

categories.description: Automated vulnerability scanning for compute instances, containers, and serverless functions
categories.azure: Microsoft Defender for Cloud (Vulnerability Assessment), Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management
categories.gcp: Google Security Command Center (vulnerability findings), VM Manager OS Patch Compliance
categories.oracle: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure Vulnerability Scanning Service
